alt.zh: ModelPort 本地 Dashboard 仪表盘截图

summary.zh: 面向 Claude Code / VS Code Claude 的本地 Anthropic-compatible 模型网关，带 Dashboard 控制面，覆盖 Provider 路由、模型库存、API Key、用量成本和健康观测。
summary.en: A local Anthropic-compatible model gateway for Claude Code and VS Code Claude, with a dashboard control plane for provider routing, model inventory, API keys, usage cost, and health checks.

alt.zh: QuantPilot AI 量化分析工作台真实截图
alt.en: QuantPilot AI quantitative research workbench screenshot

summary.zh: 面向量化投研的 AI 工作台，覆盖自然语言任务、真实行情数据、策略平台、Agent Eval、Skills、日志和运维治理。
summary.en: An AI workspace for quantitative research, covering natural-language tasks, market data, strategy modules, Agent Eval, skills, logs, and operations.

alt.zh: RoutePilot 城市探索工作台真实截图

summary.zh: AI 旅行路线规划工作台，围绕城市探索、北京 POI/UGC 数据、预生成路线库、预算约束、动态重规划和行程结果分享。
summary.en: An AI travel route planning workspace for city discovery, Beijing POI and UGC data, precomputed route libraries, budget constraints, dynamic replanning, and itinerary sharing.

alt.zh: Mamoji 企业经营工作台真实截图

summary.zh: 面向初创公司和小团队的轻量经营管理系统，统一收入、成本、预算、票据、税务、人员薪酬和生产运维。
summary.en: A lightweight business operations system for startups and small teams, covering revenue, costs, budgets, receipts, tax, payroll, and production operations.

alt.zh: SellerHarbor 跨境卖家商品运营看板真实截图
alt.en: SellerHarbor cross-border seller operations dashboard screenshot

summary.zh: 面向 Temu / TikTok Shop 跨境卖家的商品运营港，统一商品主档、平台 Listing、海外仓库存、真实反馈、内容生成和审核动作。
summary.en: A product operations harbor for Temu and TikTok Shop sellers, unifying product master data, platform listings, overseas inventory, real feedback, generation, and review workflows.

alt.zh: 股票投研数据助手项目封面

summary.zh: 围绕股票研究和问财数据的投研辅助项目，用 Python 串联数据获取、分析逻辑和策略探索流程。
summary.en: A Python-based stock research assistant that connects data collection, analysis logic, and strategy exploration around market research workflows.
